title: NATON Nitrile Vinyl Gloves L, Multi-Purpose Blue Disposable Gloves, Powder Free, Latex Free, Protein Free,Extra Strong - Pack of 100 (Large)
features: 👩‍⚕️PREMIUM QUALITY MATERIAL & SAFE:NATON disposable latex free gloves are high quality and durable. They are made of vinyl and nitrile materials and are resistant for a higher level of protection against liquids, gases and sharp objects.The gloves meet EN 455 standards and provide safe protection against viruses, bacteria and chemicals.

🧪LATEX AND POWDER FREE: Free of natural rubber latex and powders, NATON nitrile vinyl gloves offer maximum safety without the risk of allergic reactions. It's your perfect choice for a worry-free, safe experience.

🩺MULTI-PURPOSE:Our non-sterile disposable gloves are used for many commercial, industrial and household applications, e.g. med examination, cleaning, food prep, tattoo, painting, pet care, home improvements, mechanic, manufacturing, and more.

💉EXTRA GRIP：The vinyl multi-purpose gloves feature textured fingertips for maximum grip on wet and dry items, are textured for grip, sensitivity and added thickness. It is easy to open, quick to put on and take off.

📞100% SATISFACTION AFTER-SALE SERVICE：If you don't necessary like this disposable nitrile vinyl gloves for any reason, simply just contact us within 30 days for FULL REFUND and you will be satisfied with this purchase. NATON is a good choice as your home supplies!
description: Product Description ABOUT NATON GROUP Established in 2003, Naton Medical Group,is an international medical health care industrygroup that integrates independent research and development, production, specialized marketing andhigh-quality medical service. We insist on innovation driven and has carried out the strategic layout of R&D collaboration in theglobal scope. NATON Nitrile Examination Gloves Nitrile Gloves, Powder-Free, Latex-Free, Non-Sterile,Food Safe NATON glove is designed with safety, comfort, and convenience in mind, crafted from high-grade nitrile material, latex-free and protein-free,not only provide ultimate protection but also cater to those with specific allergies. Certified by EN 455, our gloves are also exceptionally versatile, perfect for home or professional use, and be disposed of after use for absolute convenience. No protein No allergic reaction to skin Elastic, comfortable fit to the hand Ultra thin, flexible, easy to operate Intimate Detail Design Anti static, safer Anti slip design, more stable grip The surface is clean and clean Prevent Cross Infection Naton Disposable Nitrile Golves can be safely and confidently worn for surgery, examinations, working in factories, handling chemicals, catering, using cleaning and disinfectant products Product Performance It meets the standard of "EN455" Single-Use medical rubber examination gloves.
